articles.title: Sharkapalooza Festival To Celebrate Art, Marine Life At Clearwater Park
articles.description: This year's Sharkapalooza festival, centered on art, education, community and ocean conservation, will take place at Coachman Park.
articles.content:
This year's Sharkapalooza festival, centered on art, education, community and ocean conservation, will take place at Coachman Park.
CLEARWATER, FL — It’s a big year for Sharkapalooza, which hosts its fifth annual ocean-inspired festival on May 16, 10... [6788 chars]
